turns.name: CHIEF JUSTICE REHNQUIST
turns.text: The opinions of the Court in two cases will be announced by Justice White.

turns.name: JUSTICE WHITE
turns.text: The first case is Barker against Kansas, No. 91-611, and for the reasons stated in an opinion on file with the Clerk, the judgment of the Kansas Supreme Court is reversed and the case is remanded. Justice Stevens has filed a concurring opinion in which Justice Thomas has joined.
